live.title: Dempo Sports Club vs Rajasthan United FC - 19 Apr 2026
live.shortDescription: Dempo Sports Club face Rajasthan United FC in a key Indian Football League showdown, with both teams looking to gain crucial momentum in a tightly packed table. Dempo will aim to make home advantage count and impose control, while Rajasthan United travel with the intent of staying compact and pushing for a valuable result away from home. Tune in to catch all the action from Indian Football League 2026, LIVE on Sony LIV.
